events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. The condition is late sawcutting of control joints causing random shrinkage cracking (FD) — a fail, high-risk, installed-defective/non-compliant condition per ACI 302.1R (joint timing) and ACI 308R (curing/shrinkage rate), requiring EOR evaluation and crack repair before closeout.
